prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 宁夏大学在新疆理科仅2025年有录取数据，最低位次约17051名（林学专业），无法判断长期走势；2025年基准位次为17051名；该校在新疆理科2025年计划2人，2026年计划仍为2人，招生规模持平，未对竞争格局产生方向性影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 宁夏大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软 科中国大学主榜排名近年略有波动：2024年第128名→2025年第134名→2026年第137名，整体处于全国中上游水平；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉 及图书馆占座物品管理事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第104位（样本14条视频），评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高，未出现报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常 记录中无宁夏大学相关数据；该校在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，学科竞争力整体处于中等水平，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 招生专业为林学（宁夏银川市），属农林类专业，社会整体热度一般；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人（含文理），按2025年理科占比68.6%估算，2026 年理科考生约163268人，较2025年大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川市，与新疆同属西北地区，地域偏好上无明 显跨省障碍；该校在新疆招生人数极少（仅2人），属外省招生规模较小的院校，招生计划微调对位次影响敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17051名、2026年招生计划 持平、新疆理科考生规模大幅增加（竞争加剧）以及学校声誉平稳、专业热度一般等因素，预计2026年录取位次将小幅后移；预测最低位次约17081名，区间16581–17581名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 宁夏大学在新疆理科仅投放林学一个专业，招生计划仅2人，专业选择空间极小。位次在预测区间（16581–17581名）内可考虑填报，位次明显优于区间上限（<16581名）录取概 率较高；位次接近区间下限（>17581名）则风险较大。建议将该专业作为冲一冲的志愿，同时准备其他保底院校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Ningxia University has admission data in Xinjiang Science only for 2025, with a minimum ranking of approximately 17051 (Forestry major), making it impossible to determine long-term trends; the baseline ranking for 2025 is 17051; the university plans to enroll 2 students in Xinjiang Science in 2025, and the plan remains 2 in 2026, with enrollment scale unchanged, having no directional impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has fluctuated slightly in recent years: 128th in 2024 → 134th in 2025 → 137th in 2026, overall at the mid-to-upper level nationally; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving an incident of library seat-occupying item management, with no major negative public opinion; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 104th (sample of 14 videos), rated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity; there are no abnormal admission records related to Ningxia University; the university has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with overall discipline competitiveness at a medium level, having limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The enrollment major is Forestry (Yinchuan City, Ningxia), which belongs to agriculture and forestry majors, with generally average social popularity; the number of Science candidates in Xinjiang in 2025 is approximately 52538, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 238000 (including arts and sciences). Based on the 2025 Science proportion of 68.6%, the estimated number of Science candidates in 2026 is about 163268, a significant increase from 2025, leading to intensified competition; Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan City, Ningxia, in the same northwest region as Xinjiang, with no obvious cross-provincial barriers in regional preference; the university enrolls very few students in Xinjiang (only 2), making it a small-scale enrollment institution from other provinces, where adjustments in enrollment plans are sensitive to ranking impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 17051, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the number of Science candidates in Xinjiang (intensified competition), stable university reputation, and average major popularity, the admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17081, with a range of 16581–17581.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Ningxia University only offers one major, Forestry, in Xinjiang Science, with an enrollment plan of only 2 students, providing extremely limited major selection. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (16581–17581) may consider applying; those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<16581) have a higher probability of admission; those with rankings near the lower limit (>17581) face greater risk. It is recommended to treat this major as a 'reach' choice while preparing other backup schools.
